name: Sunday Swing Golf
address: Moraga Shopping Center, Moraga Way Suite D, Moraga, CA 94556
about: Sunday Swing is an indoor golf training facility offering expert instruction and tour-level technology to help you improve your golf skills and exceed your golf goals. They provide a comprehensive approach, breaking down and measuring all aspects of the golf game including full swing, short game, putting, physical, and mental conditioning. With state-of-the-art technology like TrackMan4 and Puttview, the facility offers detailed swing data and an interactive putting experience, complemented by a team of PGA professionals, fitness trainers, and a physical therapist.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level TrackMan4 and Sportsbox AI technology for precise swing analysis
Comprehensive coaching approach covering all aspects of the game from swing to physical fitness
Junior programs and dedicated coaching for young players under 18
Professional club fitting services to optimize equipment for your game

simulator_hardware.notes: Four state-of-the-art swing bays equipped with TrackMan4 technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or you can work with their master fitters to find the right equipment for you through their club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answers: There is no mention of an on-site kitchen or bar, so it is likely a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) facility, though food and drink policies are not explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Website content does not specify the time required to play 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Sunday Swing offers junior coaching programs specifically for players 18 and under, with dedicated sessions and packages tailored for young golfers.
